ques: Find a round trip from Phoenix to Miami (Jul. 7th - Jul. 10th), show the First Class plane tickets for me that do not exceed $1320..
answer: No First Class round-trip tickets from Phoenix (PHX) to Miami (MIA) for Jul 7–10 fall at or under $1,320. The cheapest available First Class fare is $1,572 (Delta, 1 stop, round trip); other options run $1,572–$2,096+. Therefore no flights satisfy the "not exceeding $1,320" constraint.
